name: Athenian Couscous Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetable broth and couscous in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat and let stand, covered, for 5 minutes until absorbed.
2. Transfer the couscous to a bowl and allow it to cool. When cooled, break apart any lumps with your fingers.
3. Add the tomato, green onions, cucumber, parsley, and feta to the couscous in the bowl.
4. In a small jar, combine the lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, salt, pepper, and cayenne. Stir well to mix. Pour over the salad and toss until evenly coated.
5. Refrigerate until chilled; bring to room temperature before serving.
